# pihole_domain_list (Resource)

Manages a domain list entry (allow/deny, exact/regex) in PiHole.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pihole_domain_list" "block_ads" {
  domain  = "ads.example.com"
  type    = "deny"
  kind    = "exact"
  comment = "Block ads from example.com"
  groups  = [0]
  enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain or regex pattern.
- `kind` (String) The match kind: exact or regex.
- `type` (String) The list type: allow or deny.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Optional comment for this domain entry.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this domain entry is enabled.
- `groups` (List of Number) List of group IDs this domain entry belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID in format type:kind:domain.
